customErrorMessages.errorMessage: Template Bundles in a Draft status cannot be used for Skill or Role bundles. Template Bundles in a Deprecated status cannot be used for Skill or Role bundles UNLESS they were already set before becoming Deprecated.

Flow.description: Prevents assignment of template bundles in draft and deprecated status (unless incumbent) to Skill and ROle bundle fields but NOT OOTB bundle field.
Flow.interviewLabel: Shift: Create/Update: Prevent Draft and Deprecated Skill/Role Bundles {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Shift: Create/Update: Prevent Draft and Deprecated Skill/Role Bundles
